requiredField.comment: An error message shown when user interacts with a required form control but does not provide a value

selectedValueNotFound.source: Selected value not found in the list items
selectedValueNotFound.comment: An error message shown when dropdown/combobox/radioButton form control selected value is not found in dataSource
selectedValueNotFound.de: Der markierte Wert wurde nicht in den Listeneinträgen gefunden
selectedValueNotFound.es: No se encontró el valor seleccionado en los elementos de la lista
selectedValueNotFound.fr-fr: La valeur sélectionnée ne figure pas dans la liste
selectedValueNotFound.ja: 選択された値はリスト項目に見つかりません

hexColor.comment: An error message shown when a form control has an incorrectly formatted hex value
hexColor.fr-fr: Code hexadécimal de couleur non valide
hexColor.ja: 無効な 16 進数表記色

date.comment: An error message shown when a form control has an invalid date

maxDecimalPlaces.source: Value must not have more than {{ validationValue }} decimals
maxDecimalPlaces.comment: An error message shown when a form control value has more decimal places than a allowed threshold value. {{ validationValue }} = number of decimals; do not translate it.
maxDecimalPlaces.de: Der Wert darf nicht mehr als {{ validationValue }} Dezimalstellen haben
maxDecimalPlaces.es: El valor no debe tener más de {{ validationValue }} decimales
maxDecimalPlaces.fr-fr: La valeur ne doit pas contenir plus de {{ validationValue }} décimales
maxDecimalPlaces.ja: 値の小数点以下の桁数は {{ validationValue }} 桁を超えることはできません。

maxCharacters.comment: An error message shown below a form control when text length is greater than allowed threshold value (validationValue is the threshold value)
maxCharacters.fr-fr: Le nombre maximum est de {{ validationValue }} caractères

minCharacters.comment: An error message shown when a text length entered in a form control does not meet required threshold (validationValue is the threshold value)
minCharacters.fr-fr: Le nombre minimum est de {{ validationValue }} caractères

invalidEmail.comment: An error message shown when a form control value does not match expected email format
invalidEmail.es: Dirección de correo electrónico no válida
invalidEmail.ja: 無効な電子メールアドレスです

invalidUrl.comment: An error message shown when a form control value does not match expected url format

number.comment: An error message shown when a number form control has a non-numeric value
